movie.title: The Fortress (2017) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Korean] BluRay 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDrive
movie.synopsis: In 1636, the Qing dynasty attacks Joseon. King Injo and his retainers, including Choi Myung-kil and Kim Sang-hun, hide in the mountain fortress city of Namhansanseong. They are isolated from the outside. Meanwhile, Choi Myung-kil insists that they enter into negotiations with the Qing dynasty, but Kim Sang-hun proposes that they keep fighting.
